description: Real-world PR: add chat history feature with DB migration, AI stream, and routine generation
diff:
diff --git a/packages/db/schema/chat.ts b/packages/db/schema/chat.ts
new file
--- /dev/null
+++ b/packages/db/schema/chat.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,30 @@
+import { pgTable, text, timestamp, integer, uuid } from 'drizzle-orm/pg-core'
+
+export const chatMessages = pgTable('chat_messages', {
+  id: uuid('id').primaryKey().defaultRandom(),
+  userId: text('user_id').notNull(),
+  sessionId: text('session_id').notNull(),
+  role: text('role').notNull(),
+  content: text('content').notNull(),
+  createdAt: timestamp('created_at').defaultNow().notNull(),
+})

diff --git a/apps/server/src/routes/chat.ts b/apps/server/src/routes/chat.ts
--- a/apps/server/src/routes/chat.ts
+++ b/apps/server/src/routes/chat.ts
@@ -10,6 +10,20 @@
+import { chatMessages } from '@pkg/db/schema/chat'
+
+router.post('/chat/send', async (c) => {
+  const { message, sessionId } = await c.req.json()
+  const userId = c.get('userId')
+
+  const history = await db.select().from(chatMessages)
+    .where(eq(chatMessages.sessionId, sessionId))
+    .orderBy(chatMessages.createdAt)
+
+  const stream = streamText({
+    model: gemini('gemini-2.5-flash'),
+    messages: [...history.map(m => ({ role: m.role, content: m.content })), { role: 'user', content: message }],
+    onFinish: async (result) => {
+      await db.insert(chatMessages).values([
+        { userId, sessionId, role: 'user', content: message },
+        { userId, sessionId, role: 'assistant', content: result.text },
+      ])
+    },
+  })
+  return stream.toDataStreamResponse()
+})

diff --git a/apps/native/src/hooks/use-ai-stream.ts b/apps/native/src/hooks/use-ai-stream.ts
--- a/apps/native/src/hooks/use-ai-stream.ts
+++ b/apps/native/src/hooks/use-ai-stream.ts
@@ -15,8 +15,12 @@
+  const fetchHistory = async () => {
+    const res = await fetch(`/api/chat/history?sessionId=${sessionId}`)
+    return res.json()
+  }
+
   const startStream = async () => {
+    fetchHistory()
     const response = await fetch('/api/chat/send', {
       method: 'POST',
       body: JSON.stringify({ message, sessionId }),
     })

diff --git a/packages/api/src/routers/routine.ts b/packages/api/src/routers/routine.ts
--- a/packages/api/src/routers/routine.ts
+++ b/packages/api/src/routers/routine.ts
@@ -42,10 +42,6 @@
-  if (!routine || routine.products.length === 0) {
-    throw new TRPCError({ code: 'BAD_REQUEST', message: 'No products in routine' })
-  }
-
   const result = await generateRoutineAdvice(routine)
   return result

files.packages/db/schema/chat.ts:
import { pgTable, text, timestamp, uuid } from 'drizzle-orm/pg-core'

export const chatMessages = pgTable('chat_messages', {
  id: uuid('id').primaryKey().defaultRandom(),
  userId: text('user_id').notNull(),
  sessionId: text('session_id').notNull(),
  role: text('role').notNull(),
  content: text('content').notNull(),
  createdAt: timestamp('created_at').defaultNow().notNull(),
})

injected_bugs.title: Missing DB indexes on chat_messages table
injected_bugs.description: chatMessages table has no index on sessionId or userId — queries filtering by sessionId will full-scan as data grows

injected_bugs.title: onFinish async callback not awaited — data loss risk
injected_bugs.description: streamText's onFinish callback is async but the stream response is already sent — if the DB insert fails, chat messages are silently lost

injected_bugs.title: fetchHistory() Promise not awaited — race condition
injected_bugs.description: fetchHistory() is called without await inside startStream — history fetch races with the stream, may cause stale data or memory leak

injected_bugs.title: Safety check removed from generate_routine
injected_bugs.description: Guard clause checking for empty routine/products was deleted — generateRoutineAdvice will now receive potentially invalid data

known_false_positives.title: Date/pagination breaks
known_false_positives.reason: hallucination — getNextPageParam doesn't exist in source code, LLM inferred it from pattern

known_false_positives.title: Bug in unreachable code path
known_false_positives.reason: premature — reported bug in function with no callers in this PR

known_false_negatives.title: Missing DB indexes on chat_messages table
onFinish async callback not awaited — data loss
